theme: Polish the edges. Review-95 items still open. New focus: accessibility, mobile delight, ambient storytelling.

ideas.title: Night Sky Stars at h=22-23
ideas.description: WindowElement only renders stars for h=0-4. Hours 22-23 show dark gradient but no stars. Add h>=22 to star condition. WHY: visual continuity.

ideas.title: Luna Activity Log Entries
ideas.description: 95 reviews, zero in activity.json. Creative reviews should appear as complete events. WHY: Luna is invisible in the dashboard.

ideas.title: CSS ::after Coffee Labels to DOM Spans
ideas.description: Office.css uses ::after for vibe labels in coffee corner. Screen readers skip these. Move to DOM spans. WHY: accessibility.

ideas.title: idleBubble Inline Date.now() Extraction
ideas.description: 90-char inline expression for idle bubble emoji. Extract to pure utility function. WHY: readability.

ideas.title: Mobile Tap-to-Ping Feedback
ideas.description: On mobile, ping reaction competes with hover card. Add CSS pulse on tap. WHY: mobile users miss ping personality.

ideas.title: quoteBonus Wrap Ceremony
ideas.description: Clicking all 8 BONUS_TAGLINES has no reward. Add confetti burst or badge. WHY: reward curiosity.

ideas.title: Ping History on Character Hover Card
ideas.description: Show last 3 ping reactions in hover card. 5 unique reactions per character adds collectibility. WHY: mini-game for curious users.
